_description: Design tokens for the informative-images pattern. The accessibility fix is in HTML alt attributes, not color choices. These tokens document the page palette used in before/ and after/.

chart-primary.usage: ProSound X1 bar in the battery-life chart, step circles in pairing diagram

chart-secondary.usage: Competitor bars (Brand A, Brand B) in the battery-life chart

chart-success.usage: Step 3 completion circle in the Bluetooth pairing diagram

product-bg.usage: Background of the product photo illustration

card.usage: Step card backgrounds in the pairing diagram

card-border.usage: Step card borders and image borders
